title: Possessing seven qualities, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu before long, with direct knowledge, realizes, attains, and abides in the four analytical knowledges. What seven? Here, bhikkhus, when…
content: Possessing seven qualities, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu before long, with direct knowledge, realizes, attains, and abides in the four analytical knowledges. What seven? Here, bhikkhus, when his mind is sluggish, he knows as it really is: 'My mind is sluggish'; when his mind is dull, he knows as it really is: 'My mind is dull'; when his mind is distracted and outwardly directed, he knows as it really is: 'My mind is distracted and outwardly directed.' He understands feelings as they arise, understands feelings as they persist, understands feelings as they cease; he understands perceptions as they arise, understands perceptions as they persist, understands perceptions as they cease; he understands thoughts as they arise, understands thoughts as they persist, understands thoughts as they cease. Regarding states that are suitable or unsuitable, inferior or superior, dark or bright, he well grasps the sign, well attends, well remembers, well penetrates with wisdom. Possessing these seven qualities, bhikkhus, a bhikkhu before long, with direct knowledge, realizes, attains, and abides in the four analytical knowledges.

title: When a noble female disciple gives food, Suppavāsā, she gives four things to the recipients. What four? She gives life, gives beauty, gives happiness, gives…
content: When a noble female disciple gives food, Suppavāsā, she gives four things to the recipients. What four? She gives life, gives beauty, gives happiness, gives strength. Having given life, she has a share in life, whether celestial or human. Having given beauty, she has a share in beauty, whether celestial or human. Having given happiness, she has a share in happiness, whether celestial or human. Having given strength, she has a share in strength, whether celestial or human. This, Suppavāsā, is what a noble female disciple gives when she gives food: she gives these four things to the recipients.
